name: How Are U Bread
overview: A love story between Ha Do-woo, a genius patissier, and Noh Mi-rae, a variety show writer. Han Do-Woo is a mysterious and excellent pastry chef. Every morning at a mysterious bakery, he makes bread to grant wishes. To have Han Do-Woo make an appearance on a TV show, screenwriter No Mi-Rae infiltrates the bakery.

trailers.title: [하와유브레드] 엑소(EXO) 수호(SUHO)랑 드라이브하러 갈까? | How Are U Bread VR Special Video 05
